rationale: The proposed change is a statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b), not an agency rule. Gov't Code §2001.033 governs procedural requirements for agency rule adoption and does not constrain legislative changes to exemption amounts.
quote: A state agency order finally adopting a rule must include:
_note: No conflict; §2001.033 is a procedural rulemaking statute, not implicated by a legislative change to the homestead exemption amount.
